{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged green arrow
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Forged green arrow]] materialized on the woman's bow string.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
